title: Create: EasyFilling
description: Create: EasyFilling lets you fill CS'NA (Create Stuff 'N Additions) filling tank items directly via the Create Spout. Supports small/medium/large tanks, tooltip friendly, lightweight, server-client compatible.
body:
🌟 Overview

Ever been building a Create factory and thought: “Why can’t the Create Spout just fill my Create Stuff ’N Additions tanks?” Now it can.
EasyFilling is a tiny, focused add-on that bridges the two mods so your fluid automation stays simple and clean—no weird workarounds.

Place a Spout, feed it the right fluid, hold your CS'NA tank underneath… and watch it fill. That’s it.

✨ Features

> Spout → CS'NA tanks: Full support for
> Small Fueling/Filling Tank
> Medium Fueling/Filling Tank
> Large Fueling/Filling Tank
> Fluids: Water & Lava (more are handled by CS'NA as applicable)
> Tooltips: Titles always visible; extra details when you hold Shift
> Lightweight: No new blocks, no config—just proper fluid capability
> Works great in packs: Client + server friendly, performance-friendly

⚙️ Requirements

> NeoForge 21.1.176
> Create 6.0.6
> Flywheel 1.0.x
> Create Stuff ’N Additions 2.1.0.e

Tested on Minecraft 1.21.1 with the versions above.

🧪 How to Use

Craft a CS'NA Fueling/Filling tank (small/medium/large).

Put the right fluid in a Create Spout.

Hold the tank under the Spout (or pass it through your line). Done.

📦 Modpack Permissions

Go for it. You’re welcome to include EasyFilling in any modpack. A link back is appreciated but not required.

🙌 Credits

Huge thanks to the teams behind Create, Flywheel, and Create Stuff ’N Additions.
